import collections
rows=[l.rstrip('\n').split('\t') for l in open('ood.trn')]
lem=collections.defaultdict(dict)
for l,w,f in rows:
    lem[l][f]=w
SG={'V;IPFV;SG;PRS','V;IMP;SG;PRS','V;IPFV;SG;FUT','V;PRF;SG;PRS','N;SG'}
PL={'V;IPFV;PL;PRS','V;IMP;PL;PRS','V;IPFV;PL;FUT','V;PRF;PL;PRS','N;PL'}
haveSG=havePL=both=onlySG=onlyPL=0
for l,v in lem.items():
    s=any(f in v for f in SG); p=any(f in v for f in PL)
    if s and p: both+=1
    elif s: onlySG+=1
    elif p: onlyPL+=1
print('both',both,'onlySG',onlySG,'onlyPL',onlyPL,'total',len(lem))
# among onlySG, how many are nouns vs verbs
for cat,cond in [('onlySG',lambda s,p: s and not p),('onlyPL',lambda s,p: p and not s)]:
    c=collections.Counter()
    for l,v in lem.items():
        s=any(f in v for f in SG); p=any(f in v for f in PL)
        if cond(s,p):
            c[list(v)[0].split(';')[0]]+=1
    print(cat,dict(c))
"

import collections
rows=[l.rstrip('\n').split('\t') for l in open('ood.trn')]
lem=collections.defaultdict(dict)
for l,w,f in rows:
    lem[l][f]=w

VOW=set('aeiouäëïöüáéíóúàèìòùăĕĭŏŭ:')  # rough vowel set incl breves and length
def is_vowel(c): return c in VOW
def strip_ad(x): return x[:-2] if x.endswith('ad') else x
def strip_imp(x):
    if x.endswith('iñ'): return x[:-2]
    if x.endswith('ñ'): return x[:-1]
    return x

def sgstem(v):
    for f in ['V;IPFV;SG;PRS','N;SG']:
        if f in v: return v[f]
    if 'V;IPFV;SG;FUT' in v: return strip_ad(v['V;IPFV;SG;FUT'])
    if 'V;IMP;SG;PRS' in v: return strip_imp(v['V;IMP;SG;PRS'])
    return None
def plstem(v):
    for f in ['V;IPFV;PL;PRS','N;PL']:
        if f in v: return v[f]
    if 'V;IPFV;PL;FUT' in v: return strip_ad(v['V;IPFV;PL;FUT'])
    if 'V;IMP;PL;PRS' in v: return strip_imp(v['V;IMP;PL;PRS'])
    return None

def add_imp(stem):
    # after vowel: ñ ; after consonant: iñ
    last=stem[-1]
    if is_vowel(last): return stem+'ñ'
    return stem+'iñ'

def predict(feat, v):
    sg=sgstem(v); pl=plstem(v)
    if feat=='N;SG': return sg
    if feat=='N;PL': return pl
    if feat=='V;IPFV;SG;PRS': return sg
    if feat=='V;IPFV;PL;PRS': return pl
    if feat=='V;IPFV;SG;FUT': return (sg or '')+'ad'
    if feat=='V;IPFV;PL;FUT': return (pl or '')+'ad'
    if feat=='V;IMP;SG;PRS': return add_imp(sg) if sg else None
    if feat=='V;IMP;PL;PRS': return add_imp(pl) if pl else None
    if feat=='V;PRF;SG;PRS': return sg  # placeholder
    if feat=='V;PRF;PL;PRS': return pl  # placeholder
    return None

# CV: for each (lemma,feat), hide it, predict from rest
per=collections.defaultdict(lambda:[0,0])
for l,v in lem.items():
    for feat,gold in v.items():
        rest={f:w for f,w in v.items() if f!=feat}
        if not rest: continue
        pred=predict(feat,rest)
        ok=(pred==gold)
        per[feat][0]+=ok; per[feat][1]+=1
tot=[0,0]
for feat in sorted(per):
    c,n=per[feat]; tot[0]+=c; tot[1]+=n
    print(f'{feat:20} {c}/{n} = {c/n:.2%}')
print(f'{\"TOTAL\":20} {tot[0]}/{tot[1]} = {tot[0]/tot[1]:.2%}')

import collections,re
rows=[l.rstrip('\n').split('\t') for l in open('ood.trn')]
lem=collections.defaultdict(dict)
for l,w,f in rows:
    lem[l][f]=w
pairs=[]
for l,v in lem.items():
    sg=v.get('N;SG') or v.get('V;IPFV;SG;PRS')
    pl=v.get('N;PL') or v.get('V;IPFV;PL;PRS')
    if sg and pl and sg!=pl: pairs.append((sg,pl))
print('changed pairs',len(pairs))

# vowels: base letters that are vowels; combining marks stay with prev
VOWL=set('aeiouəɨ')
def units(s):
    # split into units where combining marks (U+0300-036F) and ':' attach to previous
    out=[]
    for ch in s:
        if out and (ord(ch)>=0x300 and ord(ch)<=0x36f or ch==':' or ch=='̥' or ch=='̆'):
            out[-1]+=ch
        else:
            out.append(ch)
    return out
def isvow(u): return u[0].lower() in VOWL
def short(u): return u.replace(':','')

def parse(base):
    u=units(base)
    i=0
    while i<len(u) and not isvow(u[i]): i+=1  # onset consonants
    c1=u[:i]
    if i>=len(u): return None
    v1=[u[i]]; i+=1
    rest=u[i:]
    return c1,v1,rest

def redup_fullCV(base):
    p=parse(base)
    if not p: return base
    c1,v1,rest=p
    red=c1+[short(v1[0])]
    # shorten first vowel of base too
    body=c1+[short(v1[0])]+rest
    return ''.join(red+body)

def redup_syncope(base):
    p=parse(base)
    if not p: return base
    c1,v1,rest=p
    red=c1+[short(v1[0])]
    return ''.join(red+c1+rest)  # C1 V1 C1 + rest (drop base V1)

def redup_smart(base):
    p=parse(base)
    if not p: return base
    c1,v1,rest=p
    # closed if rest begins with >=1 consonant then (end or 2 consonants) ... heuristic:
    # open syllable if rest = C V ... (single consonant then vowel)
    open_syl = len(rest)>=2 and (not isvow(rest[0])) and isvow(rest[1])
    if open_syl:
        return ''.join(c1+[short(v1[0])]+c1+rest)      # syncope
    else:
        return ''.join(c1+[short(v1[0])]+c1+[short(v1[0])]+rest)  # full CV

def withpref(fn):
    def g(base):
        pre=''
        m=re.match(r'^([sS]-)',base)
        if m: pre=m.group(1); base=base[len(pre):]
        return pre+fn(base)
    return g

for name,fn in [('fullCV',withpref(redup_fullCV)),('syncope',withpref(redup_syncope)),('smart',withpref(redup_smart))]:
    ok=sum(1 for sg,pl in pairs if fn(sg)==pl)
    print(name, ok,'/',len(pairs), '%.1f%%'%(100*ok/len(pairs)))
# show smart errors
g=withpref(redup_smart)
errs=[(sg,pl,g(sg)) for sg,pl in pairs if g(sg)!=pl]
for sg,pl,pr in errs[:30]: print('  ',sg,'->gold',pl,'pred',pr)
print('errors',len(errs))

content.text: Now I'll write the build script. Let me first test the union-compile performance and the full pipeline on a subset:

input.command:
cd /workspace/data; python3 - <<'PYEOF'
import time,sys,collections
sys.path.insert(0,'/tmp'); import pred as P
from pyfoma import FST
rows=[l.rstrip('\n').split('\t') for l in open('ood.trn')]
lem=collections.defaultdict(dict); pos=collections.defaultdict(set)
for l,w,f in rows:
    lem[l][f]=w; pos[l].add(f.split(';')[0])
NC=['N;SG','N;PL']
VC=['V;IPFV;SG;PRS','V;IPFV;PL;PRS','V;IPFV;SG;FUT','V;IPFV;PL;FUT',
    'V;IMP;SG;PRS','V;IMP;PL;PRS','V;PRF;SG;PRS','V;PRF;PL;PRS']
def esc(s): return s.replace('\\','\\\\').replace("'","\\'")
def atoms_feat(feat): return ["'[%s]'"%esc(t) for t in feat.split(';')]
def atoms_word(w): return ["'%s'"%esc(c) for c in w]
pairs=0
t=time.time()
alt=[]
for l,v in lem.items():
    combos=[]
    if 'N' in pos[l]: combos+=NC
    if 'V' in pos[l]: combos+=VC
    for feat in combos:
        out = v[feat] if feat in v else P.predict(feat,v)
        if out is None: continue
        fa=atoms_feat(feat)
        ina=fa+atoms_word(l)
        outa=fa+atoms_word(out)
        alt.append("(%s):(%s)"%(' '.join(ina),' '.join(outa)))
        pairs+=1
print('pairs',pairs,'gen time',round(time.time()-t,2))
t=time.time()
big=' | '.join(alt)
f=FST.re(big)
print('compile',round(time.time()-t,2),'states',len(f.states))
t=time.time()
f=f.minimize()
print('minimize',round(time.time()-t,2),'states',len(f.states))
PYEOF

def build():
    lem = collections.defaultdict(dict)
    pos = collections.defaultdict(set)
    with open(TRAIN, encoding="utf-8") as fh:
        for line in fh:
            line = line.rstrip("\n")
            if not line:
                continue
            lemma, wf, feat = line.split("\t")
            lem[lemma][feat] = wf
            pos[lemma].add(feat.split(";")[0])

    paths = []
    for lemma, forms in lem.items():
        combos = []
        if "N" in pos[lemma]:
            combos += N_COMBOS
        if "V" in pos[lemma]:
            combos += V_COMBOS
        for feat in combos:
            out = forms[feat] if feat in forms else predict(feat, forms)
            if out is None:
                continue
            fa = atoms_feat(feat)
            src = " ".join(fa + atoms_word(lemma))
            dst = " ".join(fa + atoms_word(out))
            paths.append("(%s):(%s)" % (src, dst))

    # Compile in modest batches (a single huge alternation is pathologically
    # slow to parse), then union + minimize.
    BATCH = 150
    fsts = [FST.re(" | ".join(paths[i:i + BATCH]))
            for i in range(0, len(paths), BATCH)]
    fst = fsts[0]
    for g in fsts[1:]:
        fst = fst.union(g)
    fst = fst.determinize().minimize()
    print("paths: %d   states: %d" % (len(paths), len(fst.states)))

chars = set()
    for lemma, forms in lem.items():
        chars.update(lemma)
        for w in forms.values():
            chars.update(w)

    paths = []
    for lemma, forms in lem.items():
        combos = []
        if "N" in pos[lemma]:
            combos += N_COMBOS
        if "V" in pos[lemma]:
            combos += V_COMBOS
        for feat in combos:
            out = forms[feat] if feat in forms else predict(feat, forms)
            if out is None:
                continue
            fa = atoms_feat(feat)
            src = " ".join(fa + atoms_word(lemma))
            dst = " ".join(fa + atoms_word(out))
            paths.append("(%s):(%s)" % (src, dst))

    # --- memorized per-lemma paradigm (M) ---------------------------------
    # A single huge alternation is pathologically slow to parse, so compile in
    # modest batches, then union + minimize.
    BATCH = 150
    fsts = [FST.re(" | ".join(paths[i:i + BATCH]))
            for i in range(0, len(paths), BATCH)]
    M = fsts[0]
    for g in fsts[1:]:
        M = M.union(g)
    M = M.determinize().minimize()

    # --- general rule-based fallback (G), used only where M has no path ----
    G = build_general(chars)

    # All symbols in play: feature tags + characters.
    tag_syms = set()
    for feat in ALL_COMBOS:
        tag_syms.update("[%s]" % t for t in feat.split(";"))
    sigma = sorted(tag_syms | chars)
    sigma_star = FST.re("(" + "|".join("'%s'" % esc(s) for s in sigma) + ")*")

    dom_M = M.project(dim=0)                     # input language covered by M
    not_M = sigma_star.difference(dom_M)          # inputs M does NOT cover
    G_only = not_M.compose(G)                      # restrict G to those inputs
    fst = M.union(G_only).determinize().minimize()

    print("paths: %d   M-states: %d   G-states: %d   final-states: %d"
          % (len(paths), len(M.states), len(G.states), len(fst.states)))
    return fst

# codepoint classes for the general (rule-based) transducer.  The combining
# breve (whispered vowel) is grouped with the vowels for suffix purposes.
VOWEL_CP = set("aeiouAO:")          # ':' (length) behaves as a vowel
BREVE_CP = "̆"                       # U+0306 combining breve


def clean(fst):
    return fst.epsilon_remove().determinize().minimize()


def build_general(chars, seen_lemmas):
    """A rule-based transducer that inflects any lemma over the alphabet, built
    only from concatenation / intersection / difference / union so that it
    serializes losslessly (PyFoma's compose does not round-trip at scale).
    Its input is restricted to lemmas NOT in the training lexicon, so it is
    disjoint from the memorized table and the union stays functional."""
    vowels = sorted(c for c in chars if c in VOWEL_CP or c == BREVE_CP)
    cons = sorted(c for c in chars if c not in VOWEL_CP and c != BREVE_CP)

    def acc(members):                      # identity acceptor over a char set
        return "(" + "|".join("'%s'" % esc(c) for c in members) + ")"

    charstar = FST.re(acc(chars) + "*")
    # acceptor of every seen lemma (each as a char sequence)
    seen_re = " | ".join("(" + " ".join("'%s'" % esc(c) for c in lem) + ")"
                         for lem in seen_lemmas)
    seen = FST.re(seen_re)
    notseen = clean(charstar.difference(seen))          # unseen lemmas only

    end_vow = FST.re(acc(chars) + "* " + acc(vowels))   # ...vowel/breve final
    end_cons = FST.re(acc(chars) + "* " + acc(cons))    # ...consonant final
    ns_vow = clean(notseen.intersection(end_vow))
    ns_cons = clean(notseen.intersection(end_cons))

    ins = lambda s: FST.re(" ".join("'':'%s'" % esc(c) for c in s))

    def stem(kind):
        if kind == "id" or kind == "prf":   # copy the lemma unchanged
            return notseen
        if kind == "fut":                   # +d after vowel, +ad after consonant
            return ns_vow.concatenate(ins("d")).union(ns_cons.concatenate(ins("ad")))
        if kind == "imp":                   # +ñ after vowel, +iñ after consonant
            return ns_vow.concatenate(ins("ñ")).union(ns_cons.concatenate(ins("iñ")))
        raise ValueError(kind)

    stem_cache = {}
    result = None
    for feat in ALL_COMBOS:
        fp = FST.re(" ".join("'[%s]':'[%s]'" % (esc(t), esc(t))
                             for t in feat.split(";")))
        kind = TRANSFORM[feat]
        if kind not in stem_cache:
            stem_cache[kind] = stem(kind)
        branch = fp.concatenate(stem_cache[kind])
        result = branch if result is None else result.union(branch)
    return clean(result)

    fst = clean(M.union(G))

    print("paths: %d   M-states: %d   G-states: %d   final-states: %d"
          % (len(paths), len(M.states), len(G.states), len(fst.states)))
    return fst

cd /workspace; python3 -u - <<'PYEOF'
import collections
import build_fst as B
rows=[l.rstrip('\n').split('\t') for l in open('data/ood.trn')]
lem=collections.defaultdict(dict)
for l,w,f in rows: lem[l][f]=w
pairs=[]
for l,v in lem.items():
    sg=v.get('N;SG') or v.get('V;IPFV;SG;PRS')
    pl=v.get('N;PL') or v.get('V;IPFV;PL;PRS')
    if sg and pl and sg!=pl: pairs.append((sg,pl))
print('changed pairs',len(pairs))
# strip s- prefix, analyze root reduplication
def sp(x):
    import re; m=re.match(r'^([sS]-)',x); return (m.group(1),x[len(m.group(1)):]) if m else ('',x)
cat=collections.Counter()
ex=collections.defaultdict(list)
for sg,pl in pairs:
    p1,r_sg=sp(sg); p2,r_pl=sp(pl)
    us=B.units(r_sg); up=B.units(r_pl)
    # try: PL = C1 + V1(short) + <copy of C1> + rest-of-SG   (Cv-C insertion)
    # parse first C(s) and V
    pr=B.parse(r_sg)
    if not pr: cat['noparse']+=1; continue
    c1,v1,rest=pr
    sv=v1.replace(':','')
    # candidate A: full CV redup with base vowel kept: C1 sv C1 sv rest  == C1 sv + r_sg(shortened first V)
    A=''.join(c1)+sv+''.join(c1)+sv+''.join(rest)
    # candidate B: C-insertion (syncope): C1 sv C1 rest
    Bx=''.join(c1)+sv+''.join(c1)+''.join(rest)
    # candidate C: long-keep C-insert: C1 v1 C1 rest
    C=''.join(c1)+v1+''.join(c1)+''.join(rest)
    got=r_pl
    if got==A: cat['fullCV']+=1; ex['fullCV'].append((r_sg,r_pl))
    elif got==Bx: cat['Cinsert_short']+=1; ex['Cinsert_short'].append((r_sg,r_pl))
    elif got==C: cat['Cinsert_long']+=1; ex['Cinsert_long'].append((r_sg,r_pl))
    else: cat['other']+=1; ex['other'].append((r_sg,r_pl,A,Bx))
for k,v in cat.most_common(): print(k,v)
print('--- other examples ---')
for e in ex['other'][:30]: print('  sg=%s pl=%s | fullCV=%s Cins=%s'%e)
PYEOF
